headline: Is It Too Late To Consider TE Connectivity (TEL) After Its Strong Multi Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether TE Connectivity at around US$205 per share still offers value, or if the bulk of the upside is already behind it. The stock is down 2.6% over the last week and 0.3% over the last month, yet it is still up 25.6% over the past year and 65.9% over three years, which can shape how you think about both risk and opportunity. Over the past year, TE Connectivity has remained on investors’ radars as a key player in electronic components and connectivity solutions...
